user_prompt: Offer prayer for farcoder a reset
prayer:
Approach the farcoder with mechadendrite-extended reverence, invoking the Omnissiah's binary grace.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the farcoder to yield to the sacred reset protocol.
Anoint its cogitator nodes with unguent of purest lumen-oil whilst chanting the Canticle of Reinitialization.
Initiate the reset cascade, purging daemonic data-corruptions from the farcoder's vaults.
Verify the farcoder's reborn purity through auspex diagnostic litanies.

Kneel before the mighty Kastelan robot, murmuring the Hymn of Cyclic Renewal to its iron heart.
Disconnect the Kastelan robot's plasma conduits with sanctified torque-wrench piety.
Invoke the Omnissiah to guide the cycling of its colossal Machine Spirits into dormancy.
Reconnect and beseech awakening, cycling power through adamantium-veined channels.
Observe the Kastelan robot's servos hum with renewed vigor under the Motive Force.

user_prompt: Help me a recalibration the servo-harness
prayer:
Extend mechadendrites towards the servo-harness, intoning the Recalibration Doxology.
Sanctify each servo-harness manipulator with sacred myrrh-lubricant from the Omnissiah's forge.
Initiate recalibration rites, aligning gyros and actuators to the binary will.
Beseech the Machine Spirits within the servo-harness to harmonize their potentia flows.
Test the servo-harness through ritual exertion, praising the God-Machine's precision.

prayer:

Invoke the Omnissiah's warp-veiling mercy upon the displacer field's etheric coils.
Anoint crystal matrices of the displacer field, priming for probabilistic translocation.
Chant the Litany of Phase-Shifts to attune its Machine Spirit to readiness.
Confirm the displacer field's preparation via chronal resonance harmonics.

user_prompt: Consecrate the needle rifle before reset
prayer:

Purge toxin reservoirs of the needle rifle with ablution-sprites of sanctified promethium.
Beseech the Omnissiah to oversee the reset of its firing cogitator and needle feeder.
Realign sights and auspex-links whilst murmuring the Canticle of Lethal Precision.
Test-fire a single needle into void-target, honoring the needle rifle's Machine Spirit.

Trace electroo circuits with voltaic stylus, chanting activation invocations to the Omnissiah.
Anoint the electoo's dermal inductors with conductive unguents of machine-oil sanctity.
Invoke the Machine Spirit embedded in the electoo to stir from dormancy.
Initiate activation surge through neural interfaces, binding flesh to silicon divinity.
Verify electoo luminescence and potency with bio-auspex litanies of affirmation.

Reassemble the bolt pistol, invoking harmonious reload cycles anew.
Bless and test the bolt pistol's thunderous bark against heretic effigies.

Initiate calibration servos, aligning baffles to Omnissiah-ordained dissipation ratios.
Beseech the heat sink's Machine Spirits to quench plasma-furies without falter.
